title: symbolanthus aureus
intro: Symbolanthus aureus, also known as the Golden Symbolanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and fever reduction. The health benefits of Symbolanthus aureus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Symbolanthus aureus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to make extracts and tinctures.
